title: Security: Keystone for macOS should use auditToken to validate incoming XPC message
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
The update system of Google Chrome on macOS is based on KeyStone:  
  
/Library/Google/GoogleSoftwareUpdate/GoogleSoftwareUpdate.bundle  
  
There is a root daemon:  
  
/Library/Google/GoogleSoftwareUpdate/GoogleSoftwareUpdate.bundle/Contents/MacOS/GoogleSoftwareUpda
